reception.title: Reception (Order Intake)
reception.summary: {walkIn} Walk-ins · {fromPickup} Delivery Orders · {pickups} Waiting for Driver
reception.errNoPickup: Cannot process order before driver pickup from customer
reception.toastIroning: Order moved to ironing and distributed {count} pieces
reception.toastIroningNoTech: Order moved to ironing but no tech available for distribution

cleaning.subtitle: Cleaning garments, handling returns, and preparing items for drying.
cleaning.toastRecleanDone: Reclean finished and returned to the same ironer
cleaning.boardTitle: Move orders from Washing to Drying & Assembly

assembly.title: Drying & Assembly
assembly.subtitle: Assembling order items, photo matching, and resolving label issues.
assembly.accessDenied: Assembly for staff and managers only.
assembly.errNoteReq: Write a clear note about the label issue
assembly.toastPhotoSearch: Searched last 15 days photos and found {count} potential matches
assembly.toastPhotoNoMatch: Photo taken, no matches found within last 15 days
assembly.toastMarkReported: Label issue reported and ops notified

ironing.managerSubtitle: Assigning tasks, monitoring productivity, and transferring workflows.
ironing.workerUnlinked: Account not linked to an ironer — contact manager
ironing.myWorkSubtitle: Accept pieces, iron them, and press done to earn commission.
ironing.noAssigned: Great! You finished all your items.
ironing.toastNoDistribute: No unassigned pieces or no technicians present
ironing.toastToCleaning: Garment sent to washing, will return after cleaning

packing.title: Packing Station
packing.subtitle: Order completeness review, final packing, and QC handover.
packing.errNotFitReady: Cannot set ready before packing all items and resolving issues
packing.toastPacked: All items packed and sent to QC

qc.title: Quality Control (QC)
qc.subtitle: Ensuring defect-free garments, invoice matching, and delivery approval.
qc.nextHint: Next highest priority order in QC queue
qc.recleanHint: Item sent for recleaning, wait for its return to approve.
qc.accessDenied: QC for staff and managers only.
qc.errNoSafe: No OK items ready for approval now
qc.errNotAllPassed: Cannot set ready before all items are QC approved
qc.errLabelIssue: Cannot approve item with label issue. Open assembly first.
qc.errReason: Enter a clear reason before rejecting
qc.toastIssueLogged: Quality issue recorded and management notified
